Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Depositions Of Plaintiffs And Request For Monetary Sanctions [Ccp 2025.450; 2023.010]
Off Calendar Feb-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gabriella Pedone, Esq., Strategic Legal Practices, Telephone 310-929-4941, appearing for Plaintiff; (CourtCall)
Jon D. Universal, Esq., Universal & Shannon, LLP, Telephone 916-780-4050, appearing for Defendant FCA US, LLC; (CourtCall)
Raquel G. Sharp, CSR#10619, Telephone 925-384-0003; raguel@transcriptlegal.com;

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court modifies its tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS FCA US, LLC, STOCKTON DODGE, INC.'S Motion To Compel Depositions Of Plaintiffs And Request For Monetary Sanctions [Ccp 2025.450; 2023.010]

Granted. The motion is unopposed and granted for the reasons set forth in the moving papers. Request for sanctions is denied. Prevailing party is to submit form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312 by email to Judge Pro Tem Katherin Huibonhoa at Khuibonhoa@chjllp.com

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk: William Trupek; Court Reporter: Raquel G. Sharp, CSR#10619, raguel@transcriptlegal.com (302/JPT)
